answer: The number of active franchise tax holders has increased significantly compared to last year. This year, there are 83,994 active taxpayers in the largest county (code 101), up from 57,631 last year. Similarly, the second-largest county (code 227) saw an increase from 43,004 to 63,084 active taxpayers. This trend of growth is consistent across multiple counties.
